mapper.select: SELECT * FROM strategies ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM strategies WHERE is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO strategies (title, content, cover_image, author, category, tips, view_count, like_count, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{author}, #{category}, #{tips}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{sortOrder}, #{isEnabled}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE strategies SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE strategies SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
